targets.expr: count(count by (hostname) (up{job=~"cadvisor|kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform"}))
count(max by (hostname) (up{job=~"cadvisor|kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform"}) == 1)
count(max by (hostname) (up{job=~"cadvisor|kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform"}) == 0) or vector(0)

panels.description: Host-level cgroup (id="/"). Per-container series appear when cAdvisor can read Docker cgroups.

targets.expr: count(count by (hostname) (machine_memory_bytes{job=~"cadvisor|kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", hostname=~"$node"}))

panels.title: Reporting hosts

targets.expr: max by (hostname, platform, instance) (up{job=~"cadvisor|kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", hostname=~"$node"})

panels.description: Healthy Docker services plus Kubernetes applications with at least one running pod.

targets.expr: (count(count by (container_label_com_docker_swarm_service_name) ((time() - container_last_seen{job=~"cadvisor|kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", hostname=~"$node", container_label_com_docker_swarm_service_name=~"$service", container_label_com_docker_swarm_service_name!="", id!="/"}) < 60)) or vector(0)) + (count(count by (namespace, label_app_kubernetes_io_name) (max by (namespace, label_app_kubernetes_io_name, pod) ((kube_pod_status_phase{platform=~"$platform", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", phase="Running"} == 1) * on (namespace, pod) group_left (label_app_kubernetes_io_name) max by (namespace, pod, label_app_kubernetes_io_name) (kube_pod_labels{platform=~"$platform", namespace=~"$namespace", label_app_kubernetes_io_name=~"$application"})))) or vector(0))

panels.title: Workloads online

targets.expr: (count((time() - container_last_seen{job=~"cadvisor|kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", hostname=~"$node", container_label_com_docker_swarm_service_name=~"$service", container_label_com_docker_swarm_service_name!="", id!="/"}) < 60) or vector(0)) + (count(min by (namespace, pod) (kube_pod_container_status_ready{platform=~"$platform", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", container=~"$container"} * on (namespace, pod) group_left (label_app_kubernetes_io_name) max by (namespace, pod, label_app_kubernetes_io_name) (kube_pod_labels{platform=~"$platform", namespace=~"$namespace", label_app_kubernetes_io_name=~"$application"})) == 1) or vector(0))

panels.title: Instances online
panels.description: Running Swarm tasks plus ready Kubernetes pods.

targets.expr: (count((time() - container_last_seen{job=~"cadvisor|kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", hostname=~"$node", container_label_com_docker_swarm_service_name=~"$service", container_label_com_docker_swarm_service_name!="", id!="/"}) >= 60) or vector(0)) + (count((min by (namespace, pod) (kube_pod_container_status_ready{platform=~"$platform", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", container=~"$container"} * on (namespace, pod) group_left (label_app_kubernetes_io_name) max by (namespace, pod, label_app_kubernetes_io_name) (kube_pod_labels{platform=~"$platform", namespace=~"$namespace", label_app_kubernetes_io_name=~"$application"})) == 0) and on (namespace, pod) (max by (namespace, pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{platform=~"$platform", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", phase=~"Pending|Running"} == 1))) or vector(0))

panels.title: Instances unhealthy
panels.description: Stale Swarm tasks plus Kubernetes pods with at least one unready container.
Normalized Docker service tasks and Kubernetes pods. Filters select either runtime or both.

targets.expr: sum by (workload, node, instance_name, runtime, namespace) (label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(((time() - max by (container_label_com_docker_swarm_service_name, hostname, name, job) (container_last_seen{job=~"cadvisor|kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", hostname=~"$node", container_label_com_docker_swarm_service_name=~"$service", container_label_com_docker_swarm_service_name!="", id!="/"})) < bool 60), "workload", "$1", "container_label_com_docker_swarm_service_name", "(.*)"), "node", "$1", "hostname", "(.*)"), "instance_name", "$1", "name", "(.*)"), "runtime", "docker", "job", ".*")) or sum by (workload, node, instance_name, runtime, namespace) (label_replace(label_replace(label_replace((min by (namespace, label_app_kubernetes_io_name, pod, node, platform) (kube_pod_container_status_ready{platform=~"$platform", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", container=~"$container"} * on (namespace, pod) group_left (label_app_kubernetes_io_name) max by (namespace, pod, label_app_kubernetes_io_name) (kube_pod_labels{platform=~"$platform", namespace=~"$namespace", label_app_kubernetes_io_name=~"$application"}) * on (namespace, pod) group_left (node) max by (namespace, pod, node) (kube_pod_info{platform=~"$platform"})) and on (namespace, pod) max by (namespace, pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{platform=~"$platform", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", phase=~"Pending|Running"} == 1)), "workload", "$1", "label_app_kubernetes_io_name", "(.*)"), "instance_name", "$1", "pod", "(.*)"), "runtime", "kubernetes", "platform", ".*"))

panels.title: Application placement

targets.expr: 100 * sum by (hostname) (rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{job=~"cadvisor|kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", hostname=~"$node", id="/", cpu="total"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum by (hostname) (machine_cpu_cores{job=~"cadvisor|kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", hostname=~"$node"}), 1)

100 * max by (hostname) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{job=~"cadvisor|kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", hostname=~"$node", id="/"}) / clamp_min(max by (hostname) (machine_memory_bytes{job=~"cadvisor|kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", hostname=~"$node"}), 1)
container_memory_working_set_bytes{job=~"cadvisor|kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", hostname=~"$node", id="/"}
machine_memory_bytes{job=~"cadvisor|kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", hostname=~"$node"}
sum by (hostname) (rate(container_network_receive_bytes_total{job=~"cadvisor|kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", hostname=~"$node", id="/"}[5m]))
sum by (hostname) (rate(container_network_transmit_bytes_total{job=~"cadvisor|kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", hostname=~"$node", id="/"}[5m]))

topk(12, 100 * sum by (hostname) (rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{job=~"cadvisor|kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", hostname=~"$node", id="/", cpu="total"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum by (hostname) (machine_cpu_cores{job=~"cadvisor|kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", hostname=~"$node"}), 1))

topk(12, 100 * max by (hostname) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{job=~"cadvisor|kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", hostname=~"$node", id="/"}) / clamp_min(max by (hostname) (machine_memory_bytes{job=~"cadvisor|kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", hostname=~"$node"}), 1))

100 * container_fs_usage_bytes{job=~"cadvisor|kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", hostname=~"$node", id="/"} / clamp_min(container_fs_limit_bytes{job=~"cadvisor|kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", hostname=~"$node", id="/"}, 1)

sum by (hostname) (rate(container_fs_reads_bytes_total{job=~"cadvisor|kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", hostname=~"$node", id="/"}[5m]) + rate(container_fs_writes_bytes_total{job=~"cadvisor|kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", hostname=~"$node", id="/"}[5m]))

panels.description: Container CPU usage grouped by Kubernetes application. Includes Docker services and Kubernetes applications.

targets.expr: sum by (namespace, label_app_kubernetes_io_name) (rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{job="kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", container=~"$container", container!="", image!=""}[5m]) * on (namespace, pod) group_left (label_app_kubernetes_io_name) max by (namespace, pod, label_app_kubernetes_io_name) (kube_pod_labels{platform=~"$platform", namespace=~"$namespace", label_app_kubernetes_io_name=~"$application"}))

sum by (container_label_com_docker_swarm_service_name) (rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{job=~"cadvisor|kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", hostname=~"$node", container_label_com_docker_swarm_service_name=~"$service", container_label_com_docker_swarm_service_name!="", id!="/"}[5m]))

panels.title: Application CPU

panels.description: Container working-set memory grouped by Kubernetes application. Includes Docker services and Kubernetes applications.

targets.expr: sum by (namespace, label_app_kubernetes_io_name) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{job="kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", container=~"$container", container!="", image!=""} * on (namespace, pod) group_left (label_app_kubernetes_io_name) max by (namespace, pod, label_app_kubernetes_io_name) (kube_pod_labels{platform=~"$platform", namespace=~"$namespace", label_app_kubernetes_io_name=~"$application"}))

sum by (container_label_com_docker_swarm_service_name) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{job=~"cadvisor|kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", hostname=~"$node", container_label_com_docker_swarm_service_name=~"$service", container_label_com_docker_swarm_service_name!="", id!="/"})

panels.title: Application memory

panels.description: Container pod network traffic grouped by Kubernetes application. Includes Docker services and Kubernetes applications.

targets.expr: sum by (namespace, label_app_kubernetes_io_name) (rate(container_network_receive_bytes_total{job="kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod"}[5m]) * on (namespace, pod) group_left (label_app_kubernetes_io_name) max by (namespace, pod, label_app_kubernetes_io_name) (kube_pod_labels{platform=~"$platform", namespace=~"$namespace", label_app_kubernetes_io_name=~"$application"}))

sum by (namespace, label_app_kubernetes_io_name) (rate(container_network_transmit_bytes_total{job="kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod"}[5m]) * on (namespace, pod) group_left (label_app_kubernetes_io_name) max by (namespace, pod, label_app_kubernetes_io_name) (kube_pod_labels{platform=~"$platform", namespace=~"$namespace", label_app_kubernetes_io_name=~"$application"}))

sum by (container_label_com_docker_swarm_service_name) (rate(container_network_receive_bytes_total{job=~"cadvisor|kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", hostname=~"$node", container_label_com_docker_swarm_service_name=~"$service", container_label_com_docker_swarm_service_name!="", id!="/"}[5m]))

sum by (container_label_com_docker_swarm_service_name) (rate(container_network_transmit_bytes_total{job=~"cadvisor|kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", hostname=~"$node", container_label_com_docker_swarm_service_name=~"$service", container_label_com_docker_swarm_service_name!="", id!="/"}[5m]))

panels.title: Application network

panels.description: Container filesystem I/O grouped by Kubernetes application. Includes Docker services and Kubernetes applications.

targets.expr: sum by (namespace, label_app_kubernetes_io_name) ((rate(container_fs_reads_bytes_total{job="kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", container=~"$container", container!=""}[5m]) + rate(container_fs_writes_bytes_total{job="kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", container=~"$container", container!=""}[5m])) * on (namespace, pod) group_left (label_app_kubernetes_io_name) max by (namespace, pod, label_app_kubernetes_io_name) (kube_pod_labels{platform=~"$platform", namespace=~"$namespace", label_app_kubernetes_io_name=~"$application"}))

sum by (container_label_com_docker_swarm_service_name) (rate(container_fs_reads_bytes_total{job=~"cadvisor|kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", hostname=~"$node", container_label_com_docker_swarm_service_name=~"$service", container_label_com_docker_swarm_service_name!="", id!="/"}[5m]) + rate(container_fs_writes_bytes_total{job=~"cadvisor|kubernetes-cadvisor", platform=~"$platform", hostname=~"$node", container_label_com_docker_swarm_service_name=~"$service", container_label_com_docker_swarm_service_name!="", id!="/"}[5m]))

panels.title: Application filesystem I/O

panels.description: Kubernetes container restart increases grouped by application.

targets.expr: sum by (namespace, label_app_kubernetes_io_name) (increase(kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total{platform=~"$platform", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", container=~"$container"}[5m]) * on (namespace, pod) group_left (label_app_kubernetes_io_name) max by (namespace, pod, label_app_kubernetes_io_name) (kube_pod_labels{platform=~"$platform", namespace=~"$namespace", label_app_kubernetes_io_name=~"$application"}))

panels.title: Container restarts

panels.description: Desired, available, and unavailable Deployment replicas.

targets.expr: kube_deployment_spec_replicas{platform=~"$platform", namespace=~"$namespace", deployment=~"$application"}
kube_deployment_status_replicas_available{platform=~"$platform", namespace=~"$namespace", deployment=~"$application"}
kube_deployment_status_replicas_unavailable{platform=~"$platform", namespace=~"$namespace", deployment=~"$application"}

panels.title: Deployment replicas
